executives.name: Robert M. Blue
executives.background: Robert M. Blue is chair, president and chief executive officer of Dominion Energy. He has served as president and chief executive officer since October 2020 and was elected chair of the board in April 2021. Blue joined Dominion Energy in 2005 and has held a succession of executive roles.

tenure_dates.title: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Steven D. Ridge
executives.background: Steven D. Ridge is executive vice president and chief financial officer of Dominion Energy. He assumed this role in November 2022. Previously, he served as vice president and general manager of eastern distribution operations for Dominion Energy Virginia.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Diane Leopold
executives.background: Diane Leopold is executive vice president and chief operating officer of Dominion Energy. She has served in this role since October 2020. She joined the company in 1995 and has held various leadership positions in the energy infrastructure and commercial business units.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Carlos M. Brown
executives.background: Carlos M. Brown is president of Dominion Energy Virginia. He assumed this role in January 2024. Previously, he served as senior vice president, chief legal officer and general counsel of Dominion Energy.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Robert M. Blue
board_of_directors.background: Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer of Dominion Energy. Joined the board in 2020.

board_of_directors.name: James A. Bennett
board_of_directors.background: South Carolina State President of First Citizens Bank & Trust Company. Director since 2023.

board_of_directors.name: D. Maybank Hagood
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of Southern States Packaging Company. Director since 2019.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald W. Jibson
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Questar Corporation. Director since 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Mark J. Kington
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director of Kington Management, LP. Director since 2005.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph M. Rigby
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Pepco Holdings, Inc. Director since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Pamela J. Royal, M.D.
board_of_directors.background: President of Royal Dermatology and Aesthetic Center, P.C. Director since 2013.

board_of_directors.name: Robert H. Spilman, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Bassett Furniture Industries, Incorporated. Lead Director since 2021. Director since 2009.

board_of_directors.name: Susan N. Story
board_of_directors.background: Retired President and Chief Executive Officer of American Water Works Company, Inc. Director since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Michael E. Szymanczyk
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Altria Group, Inc. Director since 2012.

sources.source_description: Dominion Energy, Inc. Definitive Proxy Statement (DEF 14A)
